project.title: Que pasaria si Mexico ganara el Mundial 2026
project.tone: Tercera persona/general, cinematografico, epico-comico y SATIRICO; dinamico con cortes cortos
project.render_notes: AUTOCONCLUSIVO (un solo video, sin partes; cierra con REMATE satirico, NO con '¿Parte 2?'). REGLA CLAVE: la NARRACION (voiceover/captions) habla SOLO de MEXICO en 3a persona (la Seleccion, el pais, los gags) y NUNCA nombra al esqueleto ni dice 'Huesito'. En lo VISUAL, el JUGADOR ESTRELLA de Mexico es el ESQUELETO (el character base, con jersey verde del Tri); TODOS los demas son HUMANOS normales: sus companeros del Tri, los rivales, Socrates (portero) y la aficion. FORMATO INGREDIENTES: characters = solo el base (NO se genera); ingredients = lo que se genera (character_edited del esqueleto-jugador + entity Socrates portero + location_plates). Por escena references.characters = el character_edited del esqueleto (si aparece), references.ingredients = entity/placas, references.scenes = [] SIEMPRE. Las escenas de gags satiricos (baches, inundaciones, economia, inseguridad) son SOLO humanos (sin esqueleto) -> references.characters = []. image_prompt/animation_prompt en INGLES (Grok), COMPLEMENTAN (nombran 'the provided ...', camara propia, super especificos). voiceover/captions/tts en ESPANOL-MX, 10-18 palabras/escena (~2-3s), techo ~70, KEY ACTION first 2s. CONCURRENTE con las fases reales del Mundial 2026 (Grupo A): vs Sudafrica 2-0 en el Azteca, vs Corea del Sur en Guadalajara (con drama), vs Chequia (pierde pero avanza), luego octavos/cuartos/semi, y FINAL vs GRECIA con un penal decisivo donde el portero rival es SOCRATES. COLORES POR BANDERA (jerseys): Mexico VERDE, Sudafrica AMARILLO Y VERDE, Corea ROJO, Chequia ROJO, Grecia AZUL Y BLANCO. SATIRA (burlandose de que el Mundial 'arregla' todo): se tapan los baches, dejan de haber inundaciones, mejora la economia/peso, baja la inseguridad, y el aficionado del America abraza al del Cruz Azul. GENTE mexicana DIVERSA (piel morena, cabello negro, mezcla moderna y casual). SIN ninos, SIN gore, SIN escudos/logos reales de marca, SIN nombres de jugadores reales.

huesito.description: Esqueleto antropomorfo alto y esbelto, semi-realista y cinematografico. Hueso marfil con textura/poros/grietas, craneo y dientes creibles PERO con grandes ojos cafe muy expresivos. BASE pre-existente; NO se genera. En este video se usa como el JUGADOR ESTRELLA de Mexico, pero la narracion NUNCA lo nombra.

socrates.description: Anciano griego fotorrealista: cabeza calva, frente amplia, ojos hundidos y vivos, barba gris rizada y abundante, piel curtida y bronceada (el filosofo Socrates). BASE pre-existente; NO se genera. Cuando aparece vestido distinto (ej. de portero) se hace un character_edited basado en el, para que conserve SU cara.

ingredients.edit_prompt: Take the provided base Huesito skeleton — a tall, slim, semi-realistic and cinematic skeleton with weathered ivory bone showing fine texture, pores and hairline cracks, an anatomically believable skull and teeth BUT with huge round, glossy, very expressive brown eyes — and dress it as the star striker of the Mexican national team in a detailed modern World Cup kit: a deep emerald-green short-sleeve technical football jersey with a subtle tonal woven geometric pattern across the fabric, a sporty ribbed crew collar and ribbed sleeve cuffs trimmed in thin white and red lines (Mexican flag colors), and a single large bold sporty number on the chest — but absolutely NO national-team crest, NO brand logo and NO sponsor of any kind. Crisp white technical match shorts with a slim green side stripe, deep green socks pulled high over the shins, and modern green-and-white football boots. The bones of the hands, forearms and lower legs stay visible where the kit doesn't cover them. Keep the EXACT skull shape, the big round brown eyes and the tall slim proportions of the provided base. Clean studio three-point lighting, plain neutral grey background, full body, centered, razor-sharp focus, hyperreal cinematic photography, no scene, no text.

Take the provided base Huesito skeleton — tall, slim, semi-realistic, weathered ivory textured bone, anatomically believable skull and teeth with huge round expressive brown eyes — wearing the SAME detailed deep emerald-green Mexico World Cup kit (jersey with ribbed crew collar and cuffs trimmed thin white and red, large bold number, NO crest, NO brand logo, NO sponsor; crisp white shorts with a green side stripe; high deep-green socks). He is jubilant and euphoric, jaw open in a triumphant roar, lifting high with one bony hand a tall shiny golden trophy — a stylized generic gold figure-holding-a-globe championship trophy, NOT any real trademarked World Cup design — and draped over both shoulders like a hero's cape in a large flowing green-white-red Mexican flag that catches the light. The visible hand and leg bones read clearly. Keep the EXACT skull, the big round brown eyes and the tall slim proportions of the provided base. Dramatic warm golden rim light, faint confetti glints, plain neutral dark background, full body, centered, hyperreal cinematic photography, no scene, no text.

Take the provided base Socrates (the photoreal elderly Greek philosopher with a bald head and broad forehead, deep-set lively eyes, a full curly abundant grey beard, and weathered tanned skin — keep this EXACT face and head) and dress him as the goalkeeper of Greece for the World Cup final: a plain blue-and-white Greece-style long-sleeve goalkeeper jersey with lightly padded shoulders and thin contrast piping, but absolutely NO crest, NO brand logo and NO sponsor; dark navy goalkeeper shorts, blue-and-white socks pulled up, and padded professional goalkeeper gloves on both hands. He stands in a low ready crouched stance, knees bent, gloved hands open at his sides, alert and focused. Keep his EXACT bald head, facial features and grey curly beard from the provided base — only the clothing changes. Clean studio lighting, plain neutral grey background, full body, centered, photoreal realistic human, hyperreal cinematic photography, 9:16, no scene, no text.

ingredients.generation_prompt: Establishing background plate of a packed Estadio Azteca in Mexico City during the World Cup, shot from pitch level looking up into the iconic steep two-tier concrete bowl: the stands completely filled with a colorful ambient crowd (predominantly green), tall floodlight towers at the rim, the immaculate green grass pitch with crisp white markings and a corner flag in the foreground, bright midday sun casting soft shadows, festive atmosphere with green-white-red banners draped over the railings and faint confetti drifting in the air. NO identifiable people in the foreground, no text. Clean wide cinematic background plate, photoreal, ultra-detailed, sharp, 9:16.

Establishing background plate of a packed modern stadium in Guadalajara during the World Cup, pitch-level view: a sleek curved single-bowl arena with a sweeping white lattice roof ring, full tiers of stands with a lively ambient crowd, manicured green pitch with crisp white markings and corner flag in the foreground, warm late-afternoon golden daylight, scattered green-white-red flags dotted through the stands. NO identifiable foreground people, no text. Clean wide cinematic background plate, photoreal, ultra-detailed, sharp, 9:16.

Establishing background plate of a large packed neutral World Cup stadium, pitch-level view: a vast bright modern multi-tier bowl filled with a dense ambient international crowd, a sweeping cantilever roof, pristine green pitch with white markings and clean logo-free perimeter boards in the foreground, even bright daylight. NO identifiable foreground people, no text. Clean wide cinematic background plate, photoreal, ultra-detailed, sharp, 9:16.

Establishing background plate of a colossal packed World Cup final stadium at night under blazing white floodlights, pitch-level view: a huge modern multi-tier bowl completely filled with an ambient crowd speckled with thousands of phone lights, the brilliant emerald pitch with crisp white markings glowing under the lights in the foreground, dramatic atmospheric haze and shafts of floodlight, electric high-stakes final-night mood. NO identifiable foreground people, no text. Clean wide cinematic background plate, photoreal, ultra-detailed, sharp, 9:16.

Establishing background plate of a typical Mexico City side street at night during a football celebration: low concrete buildings with rolling metal shutters and small balconies, tangled overhead power cables, a couple of parked cars, taco-stand awnings on the corner, warm amber sodium streetlights and strings of lights, green-white-red flags and papel-picado strung between buildings, a glowing little shop sign. EMPTY: no people, no text. Clean wide cinematic background plate, photoreal, ultra-detailed, sharp, 9:16.

Establishing background plate of a humble working-class Mexico City neighborhood (colonia) street with shallow receding floodwater across the asphalt: simple two-story concrete houses with exposed rebar and rooftop water tanks (tinacos), tangled cables overhead, a pothole-marked road with puddles reflecting an overcast grey sky, modest closed shopfronts and metal doors. EMPTY: no people, no text. Clean wide cinematic background plate, photoreal, ultra-detailed, sharp, 9:16.

Establishing background plate of the Angel de la Independencia monument on Paseo de la Reforma, Mexico City, at night decorated for a massive football celebration: the tall golden winged Victory statue atop its white stone column lit by warm golden spotlights, the glass office towers of Reforma glowing behind, green-white-red flags and drifting confetti filling the air, festive city lights. EMPTY: no people, no text. Clean wide cinematic background plate, photoreal, ultra-detailed, sharp, 9:16.

hook.voiceover: ¿Qué pasaría si México ganara el Mundial 2026?
hook.caption: México campeón del mundo
hook.edit_notes: Hook con cortes rapidos y musica epica: el gol contra Sudafrica, el portero Socrates, Mexico campeon, y un gag satirico (baches). Caption 'campeon del mundo' visible.

voiceover.text: [epic] Fase de grupos: arranca el Mundial en el Azteca y todo México se paraliza.
voiceover.tts_notes: 13 palabras (~2.2s). Setup, narracion solo de Mexico.

Camera: epic wide as the team takes the field. Only adults, no minors. Hyperreal cinematic photography, the skeleton player semi-realistic (NOT Pixar/cartoonish), human teammates and fans realistic and diverse, NO gore, plain jerseys with no real crests, 9:16 vertical, no text.

ANIMATE: the team walking out, flags waving, crowd cheering, camera flashes. Keep the skeleton player EXACTLY as the provided character; humans realistic. Photoreal Estadio Azteca.

scenes.edit_notes: REMATE satirico (no cliffhanger). Congelar el frame final de la fiesta con los rivales abrazados y la copa en alto.

capcut_export.duration_note: NO se fija duracion de clips: el editor mide cada mp3/mp4 con ffprobe y recorta el clip a la longitud de su narracion (~6 palabras/seg).

ending_card.style: texto grande sobre el frame congelado de la fiesta; comment-bait, SIN '¿Parte 2?'

caption_style.style: subtitulos grandes con palabras clave resaltadas en verde/blanco

capcut_export.music_notes: Epico de apertura (01), estallido de gol y esperanza (02), tension/drama vs Corea (03), explosion de remontada (04), musica comica-magica para los gags satiricos (05-06, 10-11), drama de la derrota vs Chequia y giro relajado (07-08), accion de eliminatorias (09), tension creciente de semifinal y final (12-14), redoble de suspenso en el penal con un guiño comico al aparecer Socrates (15-16), fanfarria triunfal de campeonato (17) y cierre comico-festivo (18).
capcut_export.sfx_notes: Ambiente de estadio y porra (todas las de cancha). Grito de gol y estadio estallando (02,04,09,12,17). Silencio tenso del penal (14-16). Patada y red (16). Sonido magico/'ding' en los gags (baches 05, inundaciones 06, economia 10). Multitud y confeti en el festejo (17-18). SIN sonidos de gore.

tts_export.full_script: [epic] Fase de grupos: arranca el Mundial en el Azteca y todo México se paraliza. [hype] México vence dos a cero a Sudáfrica, y todo el país piensa: ¿y si sí? [nervous] Contra Corea el Tri va perdiendo y toda la afición sufre en silencio. [explosive] Pero al minuto noventa México lo voltea y estalla la fiesta en las calles. [funny] Esa misma noche, como por arte de magia, los baches de la ciudad se tapan solos. [ironic] Y de repente dejan de haber inundaciones en las colonias… el Mundial sí servía. [worried] Contra Chequia México juega relajado y pierde; el país entero entra en pánico. [relieved] Pero como ya tenía puntos, avanza igual como líder: perder también es avanzar. [intense] En octavos y cuartos México remonta como loco y sigue avanzando imparable. [funny] Con cada triunfo la economía mejora y hasta el peso se fortalece en las noticias. [ironic] Y baja la inseguridad: hasta los rateros se quedan viendo el partido. [tense] En semifinal México gana en el último suspiro: ¡está en la final! [epic] En la gran final, México se juega el título contra Grecia en un estadio repleto. [tense] Todo termina cero a cero y se define con un penal decisivo para México. [shocked] Y el portero de Grecia es nada más y nada menos que Sócrates. [suspense] Sócrates filosofa para distraer al tirador: ¿qué es, en verdad, un gol? Y patea. [explosive] ¡Gooool! México es campeón del mundo y el país entero estalla de felicidad. [funny] La economía vuela, baja la inseguridad, y hasta el americanista abraza al del Cruz Azul.
